charge_type.charge_name: Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug
charge_type.source: Offence:   Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug (串謀販運危險藥物)

drugs.source: two plastic bags containing a total of 42 grammes of a solid containing 31.4 grammes of cocaine narcotic. This is Exhibit E1.

mitigating_factors.source: I am agreeable to give him a slight further discount for the information provided to the police. So he would be entitled to 36 per cent discount in total including his assistance and also his plea of guilty.
he had taken different courses to better equip himself whilst remanded in custody.

mitigating_factors.other_factor: Gambling addiction, indebtedness and resulting family breakdown
mitigating_factors.source: Starting from 2020, he started to gamble and eventually he owed debts in the region of $300,000. His gambling problem led to the divorce with his wife at the end of 2021.

guilty_plea.source: They pleaded guilty to the offence on 3 February this year before a magistrate and were committed to the High Court for sentence. I am agreeable to give him a slight further discount for the information provided to the police. So he would be entitled to 36 per cent discount in total including his assistance and also his plea of guilty.

starting_point.source: So for 31.4 grammes of cocaine narcotics, on a mathematical calculation, the starting point would be one of 6 years and 7 months’ imprisonment.

sentence_after_role.source: Inferred as starting point since role adjustment not provided

notional_sentence.source: So for 31.4 grammes of cocaine narcotics, on a mathematical calculation, the starting point would be one of 6 years and 7 months’ imprisonment.

final_sentence.source: So he would be entitled to 36 per cent discount in total including his assistance and also his plea of guilty. The resulting sentence for the 1st defendant is 4 years and 2 months’ imprisonment.

charge_type.charge_name: Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug
charge_type.source: Offence:   Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug (串謀販運危險藥物)

drugs.source: two plastic bags containing a total of 42 grammes of a solid containing 31.4 grammes of cocaine narcotic. This is Exhibit E1.

mitigating_factors.source: the 2nd defendant had provided a written statement to the police in his attempt to assist the authorities, but it did not result in anything fruitful and it was considered to be not of practical use to the prosecution.
he has a long history of mental illness. He first received psychiatric treatment at the age of 11 and there were multiple psychiatric admissions to various hospitals between year 2009 to 2022.

guilty_plea.source: They pleaded guilty to the offence on 3 February this year before a magistrate and were committed to the High Court for sentence. As such, he is entitled to the full one-third discount which reduce the sentence to 4 years and 5 months’ imprisonment.

starting_point.source: I consider the appropriate starting point for the 2nd defendant will be 6 years and 8 months’ imprisonment.

sentence_after_role.source: Inferred as starting point since role adjustment not provided

notional_sentence.source: I consider the appropriate starting point for the 2nd defendant will be 6 years and 8 months’ imprisonment.

mitigation_reduction.source: I would take that into account as a matter of leniency and grant him a further discount of 1 month. So the sentence in respect of the 2nd defendant is 4 years and 4 months’ imprisonment.

final_sentence.source: I would take that into account as a matter of leniency and grant him a further discount of 1 month. So the sentence in respect of the 2nd defendant is 4 years and 4 months’ imprisonment.
